blocks.body: Pronouns are words that replace nouns to avoid repetition. Main types: personal (I, you, he, she), possessive (my, mine), reverse (myself, yourself), indicative (this, that) and others.

{ "title": "9. Brief summary", "items": [ "Subject pronouns ‚Äî subject: I, you, he, she, it, we, they.", "Object pronouns ‚Äî attachment: me, you, him, her, it, us, them.", "Possessive adjectives - before a noun: my, your, his, her, its, our, their.", "Possessive pronouns - instead of a noun: mine, yours, his, hers, ours, theirs.", "Reflexive pronouns - inverse: myself, himself, himself, herself, itself, ourselves, yourselves, themselves.", "Demonstrative pronouns - indicative: this, that, these, those.", "Its = possessive (his/her), It's = contraction (it is).", "Reflexive pronouns: -self (singular), -selves (plural)." ] }
